lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission perform as new. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It requires major mechanical repairs and is not currently in reliable running condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as a functional, roadworthy car that requires some attention to reach its full potential. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, minor paint fading on the roof, and a small dent on the rear bumper. Mechanically, the engine runs reliably, though the suspension is starting to feel a bit loose and will likely need new struts in the near future. The interior is clean but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and a cracked dashboard. While it has been regularly maintained, it currently has a minor oil leak and the tires are nearing the end of their tread life. This is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle who doesn't mind performing some cosmetic and minor mechanical upkeep.

You're going to love this dependable and well-kept vehicle! It's in great condition and performs beautifully on the road. It shows a few minor signs of character from regular use, but it has been carefully looked after and remains a very high-quality choice for its next owner.

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition and has been maintained to an exceptional standard. The exterior paint is entirely original and flawless, free of any stone chips, swirls, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state with no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a comprehensive service history documenting its care. A prospective buyer can expect a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, offering a smooth, reliable, and premium driving experience without any needed repairs or cosmetic touch-ups.

We present a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a balanced fusion of performance and longevity, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness. A premier choice for the driver who demands consistent excellence without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable car that’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs super smoothly, and has been well-maintained over the years. It's perfect for your daily commute or weekend road trips, and it still looks great in the driveway. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system. Power is managed by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels via a torque-sensing variable M differential. The chassis remains taut with a recently inspected rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings. Mechanically robust with documented valve adjustments and strong compression across all cylinders, this example offers a visceral, high-revving driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and premium feel. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, the car is in solid health; it has been regularly serviced, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that performs beautifully on both city streets and highways. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for immediate enjoyment. While it shows the gentle character of a pre-owned car, its consistent upkeep makes it a dependable and stylish choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a preserved aesthetic, this unit stands as a testament to diligent stewardship. Fully inspected and ready for immediate delivery, it represents a sophisticated acquisition for those who demand quality and reliable performance.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been curated to ensure a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with long-term reliability. It represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value and proven durability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready to hit the road? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s in really wonderful shape! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior and engine. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and dependability. The exterior shines in its original factory paint, showing only light, honest wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring supple leather seats, a pristine dashboard, and all-weather floor mats that have protected the carpets since day one. Every feature, from the sunroof to the heated seats, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule—I have the complete service history available for your review. With a fresh oil change and tires in excellent condition, this car provides a quiet, confident ride and is ready for the road immediately.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by its mechanical integrity and refined interior, this model has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure optimal performance and safety. It offers a sophisticated balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, standing as an exceptional value proposition within its class.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional value within its class. This specimen exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. Its performance remains robust, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this high-caliber automobile, which balances premium engineering with an accessible valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years! Whether you're commuting to work or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road and won't let you down. I’ve taken great care of it, and it still looks and feels fantastic. Come take it for a spin—I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering an uncompromising 8,400 RPM redline through eight individual throttle bodies. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission, ensuring mechanical engagement and linear torque delivery. Chassis dynamics remain sharp thanks to a well-maintained multi-link rear suspension and M Variable Differential Lock, providing exceptional lateral grip and exit traction. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the structural and mechanical components are robust, with documented preventative maintenance on rod bearings and throttle actuators. A purist’s specification for those seeking a visceral, high-induction-note driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan perfectly balances performance and elegance. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like shine, with only the slightest signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and smoke-free, featuring fully operational climate controls and a high-fidelity sound system. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health, having followed a rigorous service schedule with recent fluid checks and a fresh set of tires. It drives smoothly, handles with precision, and offers a quiet, refined cabin experience. This is an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-end vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven mechanical integrity. This meticulously maintained specimen offers a refined driving experience, balancing sophisticated aesthetics with reliable performance. Curated to meet our exacting standards, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning motorist seeking a high-caliber addition to their collection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been curated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the professional seeking value without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride that's been so good to me over the years. It’s in great shape and runs like a dream—absolutely perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures! I’ve taken really good care of it, and it's totally ready to hit the road with its next lucky owner. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a tactile Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Mechanically sorted, the vehicle has undergone critical preventive maintenance, including subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The chassis remains composed via a refreshed suspension geometry with upgraded bushings, providing the direct steering feedback and lateral stability characteristic of the M-division. A high-performance icon maintained for mechanical longevity and driving engagement.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking reliability and comfort. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, with only minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is in excellent shape; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear on the bolsters, and all power features—including the sunroof, heated seats, and infotainment system—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced exclusively with synthetic oil. Recent maintenance includes a fresh brake service and a new set of high-performance all-season tires. This car has been garage-kept and comes with a comprehensive folder of service records, ensuring peace of mind for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model balances performance with enduring value. It has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and interior comfort. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience and proven dependability.
